title: Ryan Greenblatt
description: [Ryan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryan-greenblatt-4b9907134/) is Chief Scientist at [Redwood Research](https://www.redwoodresearch.org/). He has a BS in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science from Brown University.
body:
# Ryan Greenblatt

[Ryan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ryan-greenblatt-4b9907134/) is Chief Scientist at [Redwood Research](https://www.redwoodresearch.org/). He has a BS in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science from Brown University.
text: Ryan Greenblatt Ryan is Chief Scientist at Redwood Research. He has a BS in Applied Mathematics and Computer Science from Brown University.
